hooks.command: FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|mjs|cjs|json|md|css|html|yaml|yml)$' && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true
echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '(\.env(\..*)?)$' && echo 'BLOCK: refusing to edit .env files — constraint #8 in CLAUDE.md' && exit 2 || exit 0
